ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Bats (left, right, switch) */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throws (left, right) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College attended by the player */,
  "professional_team" TEXT /* Professional team the player is currently with */,
  "professional_years" INTEGER /* Number of years the player has been professional */,
  "player_website" TEXT /* URL of the player's official website */,
  "player_social_media" TEXT /* URLs of the player's social media profiles */,
  "player_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_players" (
  "team_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-player relationship */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (active, retired, injured, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (year or period) */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Goals scored */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Goals conceded */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank in the league */,
  "playoff_result" TEXT /* Playoff result */,
  "coaching_staff" TEXT /* Current coaching staff */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Current team captain */,
  "most_valuable_player" TEXT /* Most valuable player of the season */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., social media likes, game attendance, merchandise sales) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the engagement metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the engagement data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the engagement metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user's role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_team_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "granted_by" TEXT /* User who granted the access */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, financial, fan engagement) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report (JSON or other format) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
